login.title: AlwaysPrint Cloud Manager
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists in the system, you'll receive instructions in a few minutes.
forgotPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid link. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.expiredLink: Link expired. Please request a new one.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign out and sign in again.
dashboard.connectionError: Connection error. Backend is not responding.
dashboard.loadError: Error loading statistics. Please try again.

workstations.title: Workstations
workstations.subtitle: Manage workstations connected to the system
workstations.accountAutoNote: Note: Organization assignment can also be done automatically when the workstation connects from a registered public IP.
workstations.emptyMessage: Workstations will appear here when they connect to the system.
workstations.emptyFilterMessage: No workstations found matching those search criteria.
workstations.defaultPrinterHelper: Preferred printer chosen by the user of this workstation for contingency
workstations.noPrintersInVlan: No printers available in this VLAN
workstations.forcedContingencyConfirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate forced contingency for workstation {name}? This will redirect print traffic directly to the printer (bypass CPM/Linux).
workstations.forcedContingencyConfirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate forced contingency for workstation {name}?
workstations.forcedContingencyNotification: The workstation will receive a notification indicating it is entering contingency mode.
workstations.forcedContingencyActivated: Forced contingency activated for this workstation.
workstations.forcedContingencyDeactivated: Forced contingency deactivated for this workstation.
workstations.contingencyControlledByVlan: Contingency is controlled at VLAN level
workstations.contingencyControlledByOrg: Contingency is controlled at Organization level
workstations.contingencyNoPrintersInVlan: No active printers found in this workstation's VLAN. Assign at least one active device before activating contingency.
workstations.contingencyNoVlanAssigned: This workstation has no VLAN assigned. Cannot determine contingency printer.
workstations.restartConfirmMessage: Do you want to {action} on workstation {name}?
workstations.restartWarning: The workstation will temporarily disconnect while the restart is performed. The status will update automatically once it reconnects.
workstations.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

vlans.title: VLANs
vlans.subtitle: Manage your organization's network segments
vlans.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description or CIDR...
vlans.emptyMessage: No VLANs found matching that criteria
vlans.emptyCreate: Start by creating a new VLAN
vlans.cidrInvalid: Invalid CIDR. Use format: 192.168.1.0/24 (mask between /0 and /32)
vlans.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete VLAN {name}? This action cannot be undone.
vlans.noDevices: No devices assigned to this VLAN
vlans.forcedContingencyConfirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate forced contingency for VLAN "{name}"? All workstations in this VLAN will enter contingency mode.
vlans.forcedContingencyConfirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate forced contingency for VLAN "{name}"?
vlans.forcedContingencyNotification: All connected workstations will receive a forced contingency notification.
vlans.forcedContingencyActivated: Forced contingency activated for this VLAN.
vlans.forcedContingencyDeactivated: Forced contingency deactivated for this VLAN.
vlans.contingencyNoDevices: No printers assigned — can still activate, but users won't be able to print in contingency until one is assigned.
vlans.contingencyNoDevicesWarning: This VLAN has no printers assigned. Users will not be able to print in contingency until a printer is assigned to this VLAN.
vlans.contingencyNoDevicesWarningSaved: Contingency activated. Warning: without printers assigned, users will not be able to print in contingency.
vlans.deactivateForceAllHint: ALL workstations in this VLAN will be deactivated, including those activated individually.
vlans.deactivateSmartHint: Only workstations affected by this activation will be deactivated (individually activated ones remain untouched).
vlans.contingencyNoPrinters: No active printers found in this VLAN
vlans.defaultDeviceHelper: Used in contingency for all workstations in this VLAN that don't have one assigned
vlans.defaultDeviceNoDevices: No active devices in this VLAN
vlans.actionConfigDesc: Action configuration specific to this VLAN
vlans.metadataHelper: Key-value pairs available to workstations (e.g. remote_queue_path)
vlans.metadataUncInvalid: Invalid UNC path. Format: \\host\share (host must be a hostname, FQDN or IP without spaces)
vlans.bulkCommandSentDesc: "{action}" sent to {count} online workstation(s) in VLAN "{name}".
vlans.bulkRestartServiceDesc: The restart service command will be sent to all online workstations in VLAN "{name}".
vlans.bulkRestartTrayDesc: The restart Tray command will be sent to all online workstations in VLAN "{name}".
vlans.bulkCheckUpdateDesc: An update check will be forced on all online workstations in VLAN "{name}".
vlans.bulkRestartServiceWarning: In-progress prints may be interrupted. The service will restore automatically in seconds.
vlans.bulkRestartTrayWarning: The Tray will close and the service will relaunch it automatically in seconds.
vlans.bulkCheckUpdateWarning: If a new version is available, it will be downloaded and installed automatically.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Send messages to workstations, VLANs or the entire organization
messages.emptyMessage: Start by sending a message to your workstations

config.title: Configuration
config.subtitle: Manage system configuration at different levels
config.orgDesc: Configuration applied to all workstations in an organization
config.hierarchyMsg: This configuration applies at the organization level. It can be overridden by VLAN or workstation configuration.
config.corpQueueHelper: Name of the corporate print queue in Windows
config.pollingHelper: Frequency at which workstations check for pending tasks (1-1440 min)
config.printerIpsHelper: Specific IPs where to search for available printers
config.printerRangesHelper: CIDR ranges to search for printers
config.noConfigMsg: This organization doesn't have a global configuration yet. Complete the form and save to create the initial configuration.
config.selectOrgMsg: Select an organization from the selector above to view or edit its configuration.
config.systemConfigMsg: This configuration applies to all organizations. Each organization can override these values.
config.updatesDesc: Manage automatic updates and workstation re-registration for this organization
config.autoUpdateEnabledDesc: Workstations will update automatically when a new version is available
config.pinnedVersionNote: Workstations will always download version {version}, regardless of the latest version.
config.latestVersionNote: Workstations will automatically update to the latest version.
config.autoReregisterEnabledDesc: Deleted workstations will re-register when sending telemetry
config.autoReregisterDisabledDesc: Deleted workstations will not re-register automatically
config.topicPrintingDesc: Corporate queue, polling interval and client language
config.topicNetworkDesc: Bootstrap domains and printer search on the network
config.bootstrapHelper: Comma-separated domains the client uses to discover the server
config.validationPollingRange: Polling interval must be between 1 and 1440 minutes

audit.subtitle: Complete record of all actions performed in the system

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage system users
users.selfDeactivateNote: For security reasons, you cannot change your own user's status.
users.timezoneNote: If no timezone is specified, the user will inherit their organization's timezone ({timezone}). Admins without an organization will use UTC by default.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user {name} ({email})?
users.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All data associated with the user will be lost.

accounts.title: Organizations
accounts.subtitle: Manage organizations using the system
accounts.timezoneHelper: Users of this organization will inherit this timezone by default
accounts.languageHelper: New users of this organization will start with this language

accounts.openaiKeyHelper: If configured, OpenAI will be used instead of AWS Bedrock for log analysis in this organization
accounts.offlineTimeoutHelper: Minutes of inactivity before sending a verification ping to workstations in this organization. Minimum value: 1.

accounts.emptyFilter: No organizations found matching that search criteria.
accounts.noIps: No public IPs registered for this organization.
accounts.noIpsSuggestion: Add IPs so workstations are automatically assigned.
accounts.autoAssignNote: Auto-assignment: When a workstation connects from one of these public IPs, it will be automatically assigned to this organization.

accounts.deleteOrgTypeToConfirm: To confirm, type the organization name:
accounts.deleteIpConfirm: Delete IP {ip}? Workstations connecting from this IP will no longer be automatically assigned.
accounts.forcedContingencyConfirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate forced contingency for organization "{name}"? All workstations in this organization will enter contingency mode.
accounts.forcedContingencyConfirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate forced contingency for organization "{name}"?
accounts.forcedContingencyNotification: All connected workstations will receive a forced contingency notification.
accounts.forcedContingencyActivated: Forced contingency activated for this organization.
accounts.forcedContingencyDeactivated: Forced contingency deactivated for this organization.
accounts.deactivateForceAllHint: ALL VLANs and workstations of this organization will be deactivated, including those activated individually.
accounts.deactivateSmartHint: Only VLANs affected by this activation will be deactivated (individually activated ones remain untouched).
accounts.loadError: Error loading organizations. Please try again.
accounts.bulkRestartServiceDesc: The restart service command will be sent to all online workstations in organization "{name}".
accounts.bulkRestartTrayDesc: The restart Tray command will be sent to all online workstations in organization "{name}".
accounts.bulkCheckUpdateDesc: An update check will be forced on all online workstations in organization "{name}".
accounts.bulkRestartServiceWarning: In-progress prints may be interrupted. The service will restore automatically in seconds.
accounts.bulkRestartTrayWarning: The Tray will close and the service will relaunch it automatically in seconds.
accounts.bulkCheckUpdateWarning: If a new version is available, it will be downloaded and installed automatically.
accounts.noOrg: You don't have an organization assigned. Contact the administrator.

pendingIps.title: Pending Public IPs
pendingIps.subtitle: Authorize or reject IPs from which clients attempted to connect
pendingIps.emptyMessage: All IPs have been authorized or rejected.
pendingIps.emptyFilter: No IPs found matching that search criteria.
pendingIps.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject IP {ip}? This action cannot be undone.

actionConfigs.title: Action Configurations
actionConfigs.subtitle: Manage administrative actions executed on workstations
actionConfigs.uploadDescription: Upload an .alwaysconfig file with administrative actions
actionConfigs.selectOrgWarning: You must select an organization before uploading the configuration.
actionConfigs.uploadSuccessDesc: The configuration has been uploaded successfully
actionConfigs.duplicateDesc: A configuration with the same content already exists (hash: {hash}). Cannot upload an identical file.
actionConfigs.updateSuccessDesc: The configuration status has been updated
actionConfigs.deleteSuccessDesc: The configuration has been deleted successfully
actionConfigs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration? This action cannot be undone.
actionConfigs.activeConfigDesc: This configuration is being propagated to workstations
actionConfigs.name: Name
actionConfigs.mandatoryEnabledDescOrg: This configuration overrides and is applied to all VLANs and workstations in the organization, regardless of their own configurations
actionConfigs.mandatoryDisabledDescOrg: VLANs and workstations can use their own configuration if they have one uploaded
actionConfigs.mandatoryEnabledDescVlan: This configuration is enforced on all workstations in this VLAN, regardless of their own uploaded configuration
actionConfigs.mandatoryDisabledDescVlan: This configuration only applies if the organization does not have its configuration marked as mandatory
actionConfigs.mandatoryDescOrg: If enabled, this configuration will override all VLAN and workstation configurations without exception.
actionConfigs.mandatoryDescVlan: If enabled, this configuration will override all workstation configurations belonging to this VLAN.
actionConfigs.mandatoryDescWorkstation: If enabled, this configuration will be applied to this workstation.
actionConfigs.notApplicableOrg: This configuration will not be applicable because the organization has its configuration set as mandatory.
actionConfigs.notApplicableVlan: This configuration will not be applicable because the VLAN has its configuration set as mandatory.
actionConfigs.applicableVlan: This configuration will be applicable because the organization has the mandatory option disabled.
actionConfigs.applicableWorkstation: This configuration will be applicable because both the organization and VLAN have the mandatory option disabled.
actionConfigs.sectionSubtitle: Manage administrative actions for this workstation
actionConfigs.sectionSubtitleOrg: Manage administrative actions for this organization
actionConfigs.sectionSubtitleVlan: Manage administrative actions for this VLAN

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.subtitle: Operational status monitoring of workstations
telemetry.noTelemetryMsg: No telemetry has been recorded yet. Workstations will start reporting when they connect to the system.
telemetry.noHistoryMsg: No telemetry records in the last 24 hours for this workstation.

updates.title: Automatic Updates
updates.subtitle: Manage AlwaysPrint client updates by organization
updates.latestDesc: Most recent installer version in S3. Deployed to organizations without a pinned version.
updates.availableVersionsDesc: All installer versions stored in S3. Select versions to delete them.
updates.cannotDeletePinned: Cannot delete: pinned by an organization
updates.downloadError: Could not get download URL for version {version}
updates.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the following versions from S3? This action cannot be undone.
updates.deleteWarning: The MSI files for these versions will be permanently deleted from the S3 bucket. Workstations with these versions installed will not be affected, but will not be able to download them again.
updates.pinSuccessDesc: The organization will always use version {version}
updates.unpinSuccessDesc: The organization will use the latest version
updates.pinError: Could not update the assigned version

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: Manage printers and printing devices
devices.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, IP or description...
devices.emptyMessage: No devices found matching that criteria
devices.emptyCreate: Start by adding a new device
devices.ipInvalid: Invalid IP address. Enter a valid IPv4 (e.g. 192.168.1.100) or IPv6 address.

devices.ipDuplicateWithVlan: The IP {ip} is already assigned to VLAN: {vlan}.
devices.ipDuplicateNoVlan: The IP {ip} already exists but is not assigned to any VLAN.
devices.createError: Could not create the device. Please try again.
devices.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete device {name}? This action cannot be undone.

orgEdit.title: Edit: {name}
orgEdit.subtitle: Full organization configuration
orgEdit.controlDesc: Actions that apply to all online workstations in your organization.
orgEdit.controlContingencyEnabledDesc: All workstations are in contingency mode.
orgEdit.controlContingencyDisabledDesc: Workstations are operating in normal mode.
orgEdit.controlContingencyConfirmActivateDesc: Contingency mode will be activated on all online workstations in your organization. Print traffic will be redirected directly to printers (CPM bypass).
orgEdit.controlContingencyConfirmDeactivateDesc: Contingency mode will be deactivated. Workstations will return to normal operation through Lexmark CPM.
orgEdit.controlContingencyWarning: This action affects all workstations in the organization. Make sure it is necessary before proceeding.
orgEdit.controlDeactivateForceAllHint: ALL VLANs and workstations of this organization will be deactivated, including those activated individually.
orgEdit.controlDeactivateSmartHint: Only VLANs affected by this activation will be deactivated (individually activated ones remain untouched).
orgEdit.controlVlansWithoutDevicesWarning: {count} VLAN(s) have no printers assigned. Users in those VLANs will not be able to print in contingency.
orgEdit.controlCommandsDesc: Will be sent to all online workstations.
orgEdit.controlConfirmService: The AlwaysPrint Service will be restarted on all online workstations in your organization. Continue?
orgEdit.controlConfirmTray: The AlwaysPrint Tray will be restarted on all online workstations in your organization. Continue?
orgEdit.controlConfirmCheckUpdate: An update check will be sent to all online workstations in your organization. Continue?
orgEdit.jitterWindowHelper: Time window over which reconnections are distributed after mass events (5-300 seconds)
orgEdit.jitterWindowValidation: Value must be between 5 and 300 seconds
orgEdit.jitterWindowCalculation: With {window} seconds window and {count} active workstations, approximately {rate} connections per second during mass events
orgEdit.jitterWindowNoWorkstations: No active workstations to compute connection rate estimate

systemStatus.collectErrorDesc: The collection could not be completed. Please try again.
systemStatus.collectTimeoutDesc: The collection did not respond within 30 seconds.
systemStatus.collectConflictDesc: A collection is already running. Please wait for it to finish.
systemStatus.emptyMessage: No metrics have been collected yet. Run a manual collection to get started.

logAnalysis.buttonTitle: Analyze today's log with artificial intelligence
logAnalysis.successDescription: The log analysis has been completed successfully.
logAnalysis.errorOffline: The workstation is offline. Cannot request analysis.
logAnalysis.errorTimeout: Timeout: the workstation did not respond in time. Please try again.
logAnalysis.errorLlm: The AI analysis service is temporarily unavailable. Please try later.
logAnalysis.errorConnection: No response from server. Check connectivity.
logAnalysis.errorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
logAnalysis.overwriteDescription: An analysis already exists for today for workstation {name}. Do you want to run a new analysis? The previous one will be replaced.
logAnalysis.title: Analysis History
logAnalysis.empty: No previous analyses for this workstation.
